text.title: MVP Scoping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying MVP Scoping. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: draw-must-have-journey
step.action: Sequence steps end-to-end from entry to AHA.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
